shots.prompt: Cinematic photograph of a lone human silhouette sitting in a massive, ancient, cold stone library. Towering monolithic walls stretching high. A single, dim, volumetric beam of golden light (#D4AF37) illuminating dust motes around the figure. Deep cosmic indigo (#0B0E14) shadows. High-contrast chiaroscuro, 35mm film grain, editorial photography, Ansel Adams-inspired dark shadows.
shots.negative_prompt: neon, modern, flat lighting, digital illustration, bright colors, drawing, painting

shots.prompt: Cinematic close-up photograph of a giant, ancient stone wall cracking open. A sudden surge of blinding, warm, glowing golden light (#D4AF37) and crimson energy (#8B1E0F) bursts out through the fissure. Dust particles floating in the air. 35mm film grain, volumetric rays, high contrast, dramatic shadows, editorial photography.

shots.prompt: Montserrat typography, centered, warm white on solid dark cosmic indigo (#0B0E14) background.

Cinematic macro photograph of a human eye, details of the iris reflecting a vast, shimmering golden cosmos (#D4AF37) filled with stars. Soft dawn crimson (#8B1E0F) hues. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the iris texture, soft skin details, warm film grain, volumetric lighting.

Meditative atmosphere, 35mm film grain, high-contrast, dramatic lighting.
